message:
feat(abi): port 21 _nss_systemd_* NSS plugin entrypoints (bd-rzecx)

Close the libnss_systemd.so.2 surface gap (systemd-homed +
systemd-machined synthetic users/groups). When systemd-userdb is not
running the plugin returns NSS_STATUS_NOTFOUND with errnop=ENOENT,
matching the files/compat/hesiod-plugin convention. Also adds the
two systemd-internal reentrancy-guard helpers backed by a thread_local
Cell:

- _nss_systemd_endgrent / endpwent / endsgent / endspent (4)
- _nss_systemd_setgrent / setpwent / setsgent / setspent (4)
- _nss_systemd_getgrent_r / getpwent_r / getsgent_r / getspent_r (4)
- _nss_systemd_getgrnam_r / getpwnam_r / getsgnam_r / getspnam_r (4)
- _nss_systemd_getgrgid_r / getpwuid_r (2)
- _nss_systemd_initgroups_dyn (1)
- _nss_systemd_block(int) -> int (returns previous flag) (1)
- _nss_systemd_is_blocked() -> int (returns current flag) (1)

+ 8 abi tests covering session-shape SUCCESS, lookup NOTFOUND+ENOENT,
initgroups null-tolerance, block/is_blocked roundtrip including
verification that the flag is per-thread (a sibling thread sees 0
while the parent has set 1).
